articles.title: Quote of the Day by Ozzy Osbourne: "Rock music isn't meant to be perfect"
articles.summary: Ozzy's sentiment is a timely reminder of the importance of flawed human creativity. Here's what we can learn.

articles.title: The digital wall we built ourselves
articles.summary:
Why 95.9% of the world’s top million sites still fail the people who need them most.
Continue reading on UX Collective »

articles.title: When It Makes Sense To “Block” The Main Thread
articles.summary: The common rule of thumb is to never “block” the browser’s main thread when running JavaScript tasks. But is this a hard rule? Victor Ayomipo describes a use case he encountered involving a screenshot extension where he made an exception to the rule and decided that blocking the main thread was absolutely the right thing to do.

articles.title: Weaponizing And Defending The React Flight Protocol: Deserialization Sinks In RSCs
articles.summary: While React Server Components rely on the custom Flight protocol to stream interactive UIs, this same mechanism introduces powerful deserialization sinks that attackers can exploit. Durgesh Pawar breaks down the mechanics behind the CVSS 10.0 “React2Shell” vulnerability to show how protocol manipulation can lead to remote code execution.

articles.title: This $35 Kodak camera is the cheapest way to get into film photography
articles.summary: The EC35 camera reminds me why I loved film, but for less.
